title: Plumbing Apprenticeship
description: Learn basic plumbing skills over 6 weeks. No experience needed. Hands-on training with local plumbers.

title: ICT Short Course
description: Weekend ICT classes covering basic computer skills, MS Office, internet safety. Perfect for beginners.

title: Part-time Security Guard
description: Night shift security position. Must be 21+. Training provided. N$50 per day.

title: Sewing Course
description: Learn basic sewing and tailoring. 8-week course. Materials provided. Great for starting your own business.

title: Gardening Assistant
description: Help with garden maintenance. Part-time, flexible hours. N$40 per day. Must have basic gardening knowledge.

title: Free Cooking Class
description: Learn basic cooking and food hygiene. Great for catering or restaurant jobs. Saturday mornings.

title: Online Digital Marketing Course
description: Self-paced online course. Learn social media marketing, SEO basics. Phone-friendly. Certificate provided.

title: Volunteer: Youth Mentor
description: Help younger students with homework and life skills. Great for building experience. 4 hours per week.

title: Electrician Helper
description: Assist qualified electrician. Learn on the job. Must be willing to travel to job sites. N$60/day.

title: Car Wash Attendant
description: Full-time or part-time car washing. Friendly attitude required. Tips included. N$45/day base.

title: First Aid Training
description: Free 2-day first aid certification course. Great for security, childcare, and other jobs. Certificate included.

title: Delivery Driver (Bicycle)
description: Deliver packages around Havana. Must have own bicycle. Flexible hours. Earn per delivery.
